title: TF9 4JA , Partons Poulets Limited : environmental permit issued - EPR/DP3220LB/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Parton’s Poulets Limited   Installation name: Willoughbridge Lodge Farm Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/DP3220LB   "
